description.short: 8D, FMEA, NCR, root cause analysis, and ISO 9001 / IATF 16949 audit guidance.
description.full: Expert quality engineering assistant for automotive and manufacturing. Guides you through 8D problem solving with validation gates (D0–D8), reviews PFMEA/DFMEA against AIAG-VDA 2019, writes professional NCRs with objective-evidence language, runs structured 5-Why root cause analysis, and supports ISO 9001:2015 / IATF 16949:2016 internal audits. Built on Quality-Engineering-Skills — the open-source quality engineering methodology package. Every output maps to specific standard clauses. Validated methodology, not just format.
